title: Master Map — Navigate the Whole System
intro:
Master Map — Navigate the Whole System

The HAB Sales OS is built in layers: the Foundation explains the principle, the 8 Modules walk you through every step of a customer interaction in order, the Recovery Module handles what to do when something goes wrong, and the three Appendices give you the coaching infrastructure to roll it out, sustain it, and train new advisors into it. Click any card to jump.

FOUNDATION SALES MODULE RECOVERY COACH OS 90-DAY PLAN TOOLKIT LIBRARY

sections.title: 1 · Start Here
sections.html:
1 · Start Here

FOUNDATION The Operating System Core principle (uncertainty → certainty), the 6 objectives, the 8-step map, Trust Triangle, Mastery Ladder. Core Principle · Six Objectives · Process Map · Customer Journey · Invisible Scorecard · Module Key

sections.title: 2 · The 8-Step Sales Process
sections.html:
2 · The 8-Step Sales Process

STEP 1 · MODULE 1 Establish Rapport Make a friend in 90 seconds. Mirror neurons, the relief line, the three channels of trust. Psychology · 3 Channels · 90-Sec Window · 5 Mistakes · 4 Drills · Worksheet STEP 2 · MODULE 2 Establish Credibility Build authority. The shop tour as proof package. Trust Triangle in action. Trust Triangle · Shop Tour Anatomy · 3 Hidden Sales · Scripts STEP 3 · MODULE 3 Collect Data / Get Custody Get the car in the bay. Separate customer from vehicle. Concern vs. symptom. Custody Psychology · Diagnosis Funnel · Boom Board · Question Sequences STEP 4 · MODULE 4 Inspect & Analyze Data The DVI is the X-ray. Green/Yellow/Red sort. Tech-advisor walk-the-bay. Health Dashboard · DVI as Sales Tool · Tech Hand-off · Mastery STEP 5 · MODULE 5 Build & Strategize Run the bases. The Diamond, Good-Good-Bad, PRS, anti-kitchen-sink. Baseball Diamond · PRS Framework · Good-Good-Bad · Base Order STEP 6 · MODULE 6 Present — Educate Into Certainty Re-engagement loops, micro-commitments, the water-pump worked example anatomy. Confidence Curve · 60-90s Re-engagement · Water Pump Worked Example · PRS STEP 7 · MODULE 7 Overcome Objections The 8 Boss Battles. Translation matrix (says vs. means). 5 universal rules. Translation Matrix · 8 Bosses · 5 Rules · Boss Rush Drill STEP 8 · MODULE 8 Execute — The Close Closing starts at hello. Momentum funnel. The three families of close. Home Plate. Momentum Funnel · Assumptive / Choice / Logistical · Direction-Facing · Home Plate

sections.title: 3 · The Recovery Layer
sections.html:
3 · The Recovery Layer

MODULE 9 L.A.S.T. Recovery Complaints → loyalty. Service Recovery Paradox. 24-hour window. Listen-Acknowledge-Solve-Thank. Recovery Paradox · 4 Beats · 24hr Window · 4 Hot Counter Scripts · 4 Drills

sections.title: 4 · The Coaching Infrastructure
sections.html:
4 · The Coaching Infrastructure

APPENDIX A The Coach’s OS Weekly cadence, ride-along scorecard, 9-number shop dashboard, red-flag behaviors, HAB Oath. Weekly Cadence · Scorecard · KPI Dashboard · Red Flags · Oath · Roadmap APPENDIX B The 90-Day Implementation Plan Week-by-week rollout: Stabilize (1-30) → Master (31-60) → Cement (61-90). Day-90 graduation gate. Roles · Phase 1: Stabilize · Phase 2: Master · Phase 3: Cement · Cadence · Day-90 Gate APPENDIX C The Coach’s Toolkit How to coach. SBI feedback, 5-beat conversation, calibration, hard conversations, train-the-trainer. 6 Principles · SBI · 5-Beat Conversation · Calibration · Hard Talks · Coach’s Oath APPENDIX D The Worked-Example Library 8 anatomized PRS presentation scripts — one per major repair category, like the water pump example. Brakes · Suspension · Cooling · Transmission · Electrical · Tires · Alignment · A/C

sections.title: 5 · How to Use This Map by Role
sections.html:
5 · How to Use This Map by Role

IF YOU’RE THE OWNER Read in this order Foundation → Coach OS → 90-Day Plan → Coach’s Toolkit. Then audit one ride-along yourself.
IF YOU’RE THE COACH / SM Read in this order Foundation → Coach’s Toolkit → all 9 modules’ Coach’s Corner → 90-Day Plan.
IF YOU’RE THE ADVISOR Read in this order Foundation → Modules 1–8 one per week → Module 9 → Worked-Example Library for the repairs you sell most.
